## Which part of the playbook does this touch?

- [ ] A typo or small correction (single facet)
- [ ] A gap or contradiction in existing content
- [ ] A new deep-dive (full facet doc, following `docs/_deep-dive-template.md`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Anchor links and internal links resolve.
- [ ] If this adds a deep-dive, it follows [`docs/_deep-dive-template.md`](../docs/_deep-dive-template.md) and I updated the Deep dives table in the README.
- [ ] The voice matches the rest of the playbook (plain-spoken, specific, no boilerplate).
